description: Manual verdicts on candidate-name audit cases. The audit markdown (docs/candidate-continuity-audit.md) is auto-generated; this file is the truth source for human classifications and survives re-runs. Keys for multi-alliance entries are the normalised key; keys for suspected-match pairs are 'keyA|keyB' (sorted alphabetically).

K BABU.note: Confirmed via Wikipedia — Thripunithura's K. Babu (UDF, MLA 1991-2011, 2026) is a different person from Nemmara's K. Babu (LDF). Also a third K. Babu in Alappuzha 2009 by-poll.

K C JOSEPH.note: Common Kerala Christian name; different ACs (Irikkur UDF, Kuttanad UDF, Changanassery LDF).

ROSHY AUGUSTINE.note: Kerala Congress(M) faction switch. Assembly history: 2001 UDF (won, +13,719) → 2006 UDF (won, +16,340) → 2011 UDF (won, +15,806) → 2016 UDF (won, +9,333) → 2021 LDF (won, +5,573) → 2026 LDF (lost by 23,822). All in Idukki.

N JAYARAJ.note: Same KC(M) faction switch — Kanjirappally seat. UDF in 2011/2016, LDF in 2021/2026.

K SIVADASAN.note: Aranmula UDF (K. Sivadasan Nair) is a different person from Chadayamangalam NDA (K. Sivadasan). Caste suffix mismatch supports the distinction.

K B GANESH KUMAR.note: Kerala Congress(B) joined LDF — Pathanapuram seat. UDF 2011, LDF 2016/2021/2026.

R SELVARAJ.note: Won 2011 as LDF, defected, won 2012 by-poll as UDF; ran UDF in 2016/2021. Neyyattinkara seat.

K RADHAKRISHNAN.note: Chelakkara LDF (SC-reserved) is a different person from Kothamangalam NDA.

PADMAJA VENUGOPAL.note: INC → BJP defection (well-documented 2024). Thrissur seat. UDF 2016/2021 (rank 2), NDA 2026 (rank 3).

K MOHANDAS.note: Mananthavady NDA and Manjeri LDF — different people, different districts.

P SARIN.note: Ottappalam UDF 2021 and Palakkad LDF 2024 by-poll — different people.

K FRANCIS GEORGE.note: Idukki seat. LDF 2016, UDF 2021. KC(J) → INC.

V SURENDRAN.note: Trivandrum LDF 2011 → Nemom UDF 2016 (V. Surendran Pillai). Two different ACs but same person.

A RAJA|F RAJA.note: Devikulam 2026 — A. Raja LDF rank 2 (2021 winner) vs F. Raja UDF rank 1 (2026 winner). Different people.

ABDUL HAMEED|P ABDUL HAMEED.note: Vallikunnu UDF rank 1 — `P. Abdul Hameed` (2016) became `Abdul Hameed Master` (2021). Initial dropped + Master honorific added.

ABID HUSSAIN THANGAL|K K ABID HUSSAIN TH.note: Kottakkal UDF rank 1 — same person across 2016/2021/2026. K.K. initials dropped between 2016 and 2021.

ADAM MULSI M P|M P ADAM MULSI.note: Beypore UDF rank 2 — same person, ECI swapped name order between 2011 and 2016.

AJI S R M|S AJI.note: Varkala NDA rank 3 — same person across 2016/2021.

ANIYAPPAN|T ANIYAPPAN.note: Aroor NDA rank 3 — same person, initial T. dropped.

C SIVANKUTTY|SIVANKUTTY C.note: Aruvikkara NDA rank 3 — same person, name order swapped.

CHANDY OOMMEN|OOMMEN CHANDY.note: Puthuppally UDF. Oommen Chandy (legendary CM, 1970-2021 across 12+ cycles) → son Chandy Oommen (2023 by-poll + 2026).

CHENKAL RAJASEKHARAN|CHENKAL S RAJASEKHA.note: Neyyattinkara NDA rank 3 — same person, S. initial dropped + Nair caste suffix dropped between 2021 and 2026.

K A UNNIKRISHNAN|UNNIKRISHNAN K A.note: Chalakudy NDA rank 3 — same person, name order swapped.

K ANILKUMAR|P ANILKUMAR.note: Kottayam 2026 — `K. Anilkumar` and `ADV.K. ANILKUMAR` are the same person (LDF rank 2). `P ANILKUMAR` (NDA rank 3) is a different person.

K PADMAKUMAR|PADMAKUMAR K.note: Ranni NDA rank 3 — same person, name order swapped.

M J JACOB|T M JACOB.note: Piravom 2011 — M.J. Jacob (LDF rank 2) and T.M. Jacob (UDF rank 1) are different people, both ran the same election.

P P SUMOD|SUMOD.note: Tarur LDF rank 1 — same person, initials dropped between 2021 and 2026.

A D THOMAS|T M THOMAS ISAAC.note: Alappuzha — A.D. Thomas (UDF 2026 winner) is a different person from T.M. Thomas Isaac (LDF 2011/2016 winner, former finance minister).

ABDURAHIMAN RANDATHANI|V ABDURAHIMAN.note: Tanur seat — same person across cycles. Surname "Randathani" (place name) dropped; V. initial used in later cycles.

ANOOP JACOB|M J JACOB.note: Piravom — Anoop Jacob (UDF rank 1) and M.J. Jacob (LDF rank 2) are different people.

ANOOP JACOB|T M JACOB.note: Piravom UDF — T.M. Jacob (longtime UDF MLA, died) → son Anoop Jacob inherited the seat via 2012 by-poll + held 2016/2021.

ARUN KAITHAPRAM|K P ARUN.note: Kalliasseri NDA rank 3 — same person, K.P. initials replaced with surname "Kaithapram".

C P VIPIN CHANDRAN|V M CHANDRAN.note: Nadapuram — different people, common Chandran surname.

IRUMUTTOOR KUNHIRAMAN|K C KUNHIRAMAN.note: Mananthavady 2011 — different people, both ran the same election (NDA rank 3 vs LDF rank 2).

JOSE K MANI|K M MANI.note: Pala — K.M. Mani (founder of Kerala Congress(M), MLA since 1965 across ~13 cycles) → son Jose K. Mani took over the family party and the seat. Father UDF, son LDF after KC(M) joined LDF.

JOSEPH AUGUSTINE|P J JOSEPH.note: Thodupuzha — different people, P.J. Joseph is the longtime UDF MLA.

K ACHUTHAN|SUMESH ACHUTHAN.note: Chittur UDF — K. Achuthan (UDF, 2011/2016) → son Sumesh Achuthan (UDF, 2021/2026).

K C JOSEPH|SAJEEV JOSEPH.note: Irikkur UDF rank 1 — K.C. Joseph (2011/2016) vs Sajeev Joseph (2021/2026). Likely candidate-change within UDF, not hereditary.

K M MANI|MANI C KAPPAN.note: Pala 2011/2016 — K.M. Mani (UDF rank 1, the legend) vs Mani C. Kappan (LDF rank 2). Different people.

K M MANI|MANI C KAPPEN.note: Pala — K.M. Mani vs Mani C. Kappen. Different people. (Mani C. Kappen / Kappan spelling drift — see separate pair.)

K N A KHADER|K V ABDUL KHADER.note: Guruvayoor — different people, both UDF/LDF Muslim MLAs sharing the Khader surname.

K R RAJENDRA PRASAD|P PRASAD.note: Cherthala 2026 — K.R. Rajendra Prasad (UDF rank 2) vs P. Prasad (LDF rank 1). Different people.

KARAT RAZAK|M A RAZAK.note: Koduvally — Karat Razak (LDF) vs M.A. Razak (UDF). Different people.

M G KANNAN|PRIJI KANNAN.note: Adoor — different people, common Kannan surname.

M J JACOB|SABU K JACOB.note: Piravom LDF rank 2 — different LDF candidates across cycles.

P C GEORGE|P C GEORGE PLATHOTTAM.note: Poonjar — same person, family name "Plathottam" sometimes appended.

P T THOMAS|UMA THOMAS.note: Thrikkakara UDF — P.T. Thomas (UDF MLA 2016/2021, died) → wife Uma Thomas won the 2022 by-poll + held 2026. Classic spousal succession.

SABU K JACOB|T M JACOB.note: Piravom — Sabu K. Jacob (LDF 2026) vs T.M. Jacob (UDF 2011, died). Different people.

SEBASTIAN KULATHUNKAL|SEBASTIAN M J.note: Poonjar 2026 — different Sebastians in opposing fronts.

SHAJUMON P P|SHAJUMON VATTEKKAD.note: Chelakkara NDA rank 3 — different people across 2016/2021.

SINDHUMOL JACOB|T M JACOB.note: Piravom — Sindhumol Jacob (LDF 2021 rank 2) is family of T.M. Jacob — likely the second hereditary line in the Piravom Jacob family.

THOMAS CHANDY|THOMAS K THOMAS.note: Kuttanad LDF — Thomas Chandy (NCP, 2011/2016 winner, died) → brother Thomas K. Thomas inherited via 2021 candidacy. Sibling succession (not father-son).
